  • 06 Regionalization in OPEN-PROM

06 Regionalization in OPEN-PROM

Regionalization in OPEN-PROM

This tutorial is dedicated to the classification of World countries into the 39 OPEN-PROM regions.

Custom native region codes are highlighted, while all other countries are identified using their official three-letter ISO codes.

A machine-readable version of this mapping is available here: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/e3modelling/mrprom/main/inst/extdata/regional/regionmappingOPDEV5.csv

OPEN-PROM Regional Mapping Table

OPEN-PROM Region Code

Name

ISO Codes

Full Name of countries

AUT

Austria

AUT

Austria

BEL

Belgium

BEL

Belgium

BGR

Bulgaria

BGR

Bulgaria

CAZ

OECD Pacific and North America

AUS, CAN, HMD, NZL, SPM

Australia, Canada, Heard Island and McDonald Islands, New Zealand, Saint Pierre and Miquelon

CHA

Asia

CHN, HKG, MAC, TWN

China, Hong Kong, Macao, Taiwan, Province of China

CYP

Cyprus

CYP

Cyprus

CZE

Czech Republic

CZE

Czech Republic

DEU

Germany

DEU

Germany

Denmark

DNK

Denmark

Spain

ESP

Spain

EST

Estonia

EST

Estonia

FIN

Finland

FIN

Finland

FRA

France

FRA

France

GBR

GBR

Greece
